description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a spacious, landscaped yard. The front features a covered porch with columns, a driveway leading to a double garage, and decorative trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with a sizable swimming pool, patio area, and several lounge chairs, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with contrasting dark roofing and trim. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is bordered by a well-maintained lawn and includes paved walkways and a driveway.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a gable roof, double garage, covered porch, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped lawns and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, driveway, double garage, and decorative landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, side windows, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a large swimming pool, patio, and lounge chairs, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Angled view from the garage side, showing the driveway, garage doors, and partial view of the backyard and pool.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, steps, and decorative landscaping
